advisor.config.name: config setting
advisor.config.security_config.descripti: Checks if the Grafana security configuration is set correctly.
advisor.config.security_config.resolutio: Follow the documentation for each element.
advisor.config.security_config.title: Security config check
advisor.datasource.health-check.descript: Checks if a data source is healthy.
advisor.datasource.health-check.resoluti: Go to the data source configuration page and address the issues reported.
advisor.datasource.health-check.title: Health check
advisor.datasource.missing-plugin.descri: Checks if the plugin associated with the data source is installed and available.
advisor.datasource.missing-plugin.resolu: Delete the datasource or install the plugin.
advisor.datasource.missing-plugin.title: Missing plugin check
advisor.datasource.name: data source
advisor.datasource.prom-dep-auth.descrip: Checks if Prometheus data sources are using deprecated authentication methods (Azure auth and SigV4)
advisor.datasource.prom-dep-auth.resolut: Make sure that 'Azure Monitor Managed Service for Prometheus' and/or 'Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus' plugins are installed. If the data source is provisioned, edit data source type in the provisioning file to use 'grafana-amazonprometheus-datasource' or 'grafana-azureprometheus-datasource'.
advisor.datasource.prom-dep-auth.title: Prometheus deprecated authentication check
advisor.datasource.uid-validation.descri: Checks if the UID of a data source is valid.
advisor.datasource.uid-validation.resolu: Check the documentation for more information or delete the data source and create a new one.
advisor.datasource.uid-validation.title: UID validation
advisor.instance.name: instance attribute
Check if the current Grafana version is out of support.
Out of support versions will not receive security updates or bug fixes. Upgrade to a more recent version. Learn more about version support.
advisor.instance.pinned_version.descript: Checks if the Grafana version is pinned.
advisor.instance.pinned_version.resoluti: You may miss out on security updates and bug fixes if you use a pinned version. Contact your Grafana administrator and open a support ticket to help you get unpinned.
advisor.instance.pinned_version.title: Grafana Cloud version check
advisor.link.install-amazon-managed-serv: Install Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus
advisor.link.install-azure-monitor-manag: Install Azure Monitor Managed Service for Prometheus
advisor.plugin.deprecation.description: Check if any installed plugins are deprecated.
advisor.plugin.deprecation.resolution: Check the documentation for recommended steps or delete the plugin.
advisor.plugin.deprecation.title: Deprecation check
advisor.plugin.name: plugin
advisor.plugin.twinmaker_sceneviewer.des: Warns when the Grafana IoT TwinMaker App is installed that the SceneViewer panel will stop working in Grafana 13.1.
advisor.plugin.twinmaker_sceneviewer.res: The SceneViewer panel in the TwinMaker App will stop working in Grafana 13.1. Ignore or silence this warning if you are not using the SceneViewer panel.
advisor.plugin.unsigned.description: Checks if the plugin's signature is missing or invalid.
advisor.plugin.unsigned.resolution: For security, we recommend only installing plugins from the catalog. Review the plugin's status and verify your allowlist if appropriate.
advisor.plugin.unsigned.title: Plugin signature check
advisor.plugin.update.description: Checks if an installed plugins has a newer version available.
advisor.plugin.update.resolution: There are newer versions available for the plugins listed below. We recommend going to the plugin admin page and upgrading to the latest version.
advisor.plugin.update.title: Update check
advisor.ssosetting.name: SSO setting
advisor.ssosetting.sso-list-format-valid: Checks if list configs in SSO settings are in a valid list format (space-separated, comma-separated or JSON array).
Configure the relevant SSO setting using a valid format, like space-separated ("opt1 opt2"), comma-separated values ("opt1, opt2") or JSON array format (["opt1", "opt2"]).
